name: Velite (TypeScript Content Layer)

agent_readiness.notes: TypeScript-first content layer for Next.js and similar. velite.config.ts defines schemas with Zod. Transforms MDX/Markdown files to typed JSON. Generates type-safe content collections. Next.js plugin integration. MDX support. Image optimization. Slug generation. Frontmatter validation via Zod. Alternative to deprecated contentlayer. Simpler than Payload CMS for static content. Used for blogs, documentation sites with typed frontmatter.

best_when: Next.js blogs/docs wanting typed Markdown frontmatter
Static sites with Zod-validated content schemas
Teams wanting type-safe content collections without headless CMS
avoid_when: Need CMS GUI for non-developer content editors
Production sites needing production-ready stable tool
summary: Velite is a TypeScript content layer for Next.js — transform Markdown/MDX to type-safe JSON collections with Zod-validated frontmatter. velite.config.ts defines schemas. Zero runtime overhead. The modern replacement for deprecated contentlayer. Best for Next.js blogs and documentation sites wanting typed content without a full headless CMS. Pre-1.0 — evaluate stability before production use.
